failures.pattern: Dispatcher prompts that force git add/git commit create unwanted repository history.
failures.avoidance: Do not run git add or git commit unless the user explicitly asks for a commit.

failures.pattern: Broad any casts and whole-file ts-nocheck can make tsc green while destroying its usefulness.
failures.avoidance: Prefer precise stubs, type guards, and narrow compatibility aliases.

failures.pattern: Editing many source call sites before fixing broken ambient declarations causes noisy churn.
failures.avoidance: Stage 1 must repair src/types and package stubs first.

failures.pattern: The stock codex-loop fallback list can include models unsupported by the current ChatGPT/Codex account.
failures.avoidance: Try Codex CLI's configured default model first, then fall back to explicit model names.

failures.pattern: Codex CLI workspace-write/full-auto sandbox can fail when bubblewrap cannot create an unprivileged namespace.
failures.avoidance: Run the loop with Codex sandbox bypass in this already-controlled workspace, while keeping the prompt scoped and forbidding commits.
